steps.title: Find the antecedent
steps.content: The sentence says Lawson considers the sound an object makes before using that object in a suit. The antecedent is singular, so the blank needs a singular pronoun referring back to an already named object.

steps.title: Use the singular pronoun
steps.content: Choices A and B are demonstratives, which sound awkward for this established antecedent, and Choice C is plural. The singular personal pronoun refers cleanly to an object. The answer is D.
